Android App Development

Reach Billions on
Android

Native Kotlin Android apps, fast, secure and Material-designed, built to reach the widest possible audience and scale with you.

Build My Android App Discuss My Idea
Why Native Android

Built for the Whole Market

Native Kotlin

Modern, performant apps built the right way for Android.

Widest Reach

Android powers billions of devices, reach them all.

Optimised Performance

Smooth, fast apps across the full device range.

Secure & Compliant

Best-practice security and Play policy compliance.

Material Design

Clean, intuitive UI following Google's design system.

Play Store Ready

Full submission, ASO and launch support.

Our Process

How We Build

01

Discovery & Device Strategy

We map your user journeys, pick a minSdk that covers your real audience and agree the Android version and form-factor matrix we will support.

02

Architecture & Compose UI

We set up a Kotlin MVVM + Clean Architecture base with Hilt, Coroutines and Flow, then design the screens in Jetpack Compose against Material 3.

03

Build, Test & Instrument

Feature sprints ship to Firebase App Distribution with unit, Compose UI and Espresso tests plus Crashlytics and Analytics wired in from day one.

04

Play Store Launch & Iterate

We prepare the signed App Bundle, store listing and data-safety form, run a staged rollout on Play Console, then tune with Vitals and ASO data.

Tech Stack

Built With Modern Tech

KotlinJetpack ComposeMaterial 3Coroutines & FlowHiltRoomRetrofitFirebasePlay ConsoleAndroid Studio
Why Us

Why Businesses Choose Us

100% Kotlin & Compose

No legacy XML layouts or Java debt, a modern declarative codebase your next developer will actually enjoy inheriting.

Play Policy Handled

Data safety, target API levels, permissions and billing rules are handled for you, so your release is not rejected at the last hurdle.

Fast on Cheap Phones

We profile with Baseline Profiles and Android Vitals so the app stays smooth on the low-end devices most of your users actually own.

Ship Every Sprint

You get a working build on your own phone every two weeks, no black box, no six-month wait to see progress.

Question & Answer

Frequently Asked Questions

Real questions clients ask about android app development before getting started.

Yes, native Kotlin apps optimised for the huge range of Android devices and versions.

We build responsive, adaptive apps tested across screen sizes and Android versions for wide reach.

Absolutely, we handle Play Store submission, policies and approval.

Yes, camera, GPS, notifications, biometrics, payments and more integrate natively.

Typically 8–14 weeks depending on features, with a clear roadmap shared upfront.
